display.purpose: Primary page titles and shell identity.

body.purpose: Operational copy, summaries, and supporting detail.

label.purpose: Uppercase metadata framing for stats and system labels.

motion.selectionLift: stateful shadow change only, no layout shift
motion.loading: icon spin only for refresh and loading affordances
motion.reducedMotion: all state transitions should remain understandable with animation removed

dos: Use tinted neutrals as the default background language.
Keep build, freshness, and topology metadata visible near the shell.
Use pill or large-radius actions for consistency across admin and public surfaces.
donts: Do not introduce neon observability tropes.
Do not use purple gradients or decorative glassmorphism as a default.
Do not blur the distinction between observation and mutation.
Do not rely on color alone to communicate severity or status.
